controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to following non-banking financial companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc), for all layers
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial
Companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as
an NBFC), for all layers, unless specified otherwise:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to following non-banking financial companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc), for all layers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for non-operative financial holding company (nofhc) registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall not be applicable for Non-Operative Financial Holding
Company (NOFHC) registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act,
1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for non-operative financial holding company (nofhc) registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below

controls.control_objective: To ensure adjusted net worth calculated in terms of the applicable prudential norms on capital adequacy
controls.control_description:
(i) 'ANW' means Adjusted Net Worth calculated in terms of the applicable
prudential norms on capital adequacy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adjusted net worth calculated in terms of the applicable prudential norms on capital adequacy

controls.control_objective: To ensure capital to risk weighted assets ratio calculated in terms of the applicable prudential norms on capital adequacy
controls.control_description:
(ii) 'CRAR' means Capital to Risk Weighted Assets Ratio calculated in terms
of the applicable prudential norms on capital adequacy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to capital to risk weighted assets ratio calculated in terms of the applicable prudential norms on capital adequacy

controls.control_objective: To ensure the ratio between the amount of the dividend payable (including interim dividend) in a year and the net profit during the year as per the audited fina
controls.control_description:
(iv) 'Dividend Payout Ratio' means the ratio between the amount of the
dividend payable (including interim dividend) in a year and the net profit
during the year as per the audited financial statements for the financial
year for which the dividend is proposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the ratio between the amount of the dividend payable (including interim dividend) in a year and the net profit during the year as per the audited fina

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined under applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
(v) 'Exceptional profits / income' shall have the same meaning as defined
under applicable Accounting Standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined under applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure ratio of nnpa to net advances
controls.control_description:
(vi) 'Net Non-Performing Asset (NNPA) ratio' means ratio of NNPA to net
advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ratio of nnpa to net advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or r
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the applicable Acts, rules / regulations made
thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or r

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account the following aspects: table 1: declaration of dividend: minimum prudential requirements sr
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors, while considering the proposals for dividend, shall take
into account the following aspects:
Table 1: Declaration of dividend: Minimum prudential requirements
Sr.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account the following aspects: table 1: declaration of dividend: minimum prudential requirements sr

controls.control_objective: To ensure have met the applicable regulatory capital requirement (including crar, tier i capital, tier ii capital, leverage ratio, and anw, as applicable) for e
controls.control_description:
An NBFC (other than SPD) should have met the
applicable regulatory capital requirement (including CRAR,
Tier I capital, Tier II capital, leverage ratio, and ANW, as
applicable) for each of the last three financial years including
the financial year for which the dividend is proposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have met the applicable regulatory capital requirement (including crar, tier i capital, tier ii capital, leverage ratio, and anw, as applicable) for e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be since registration
controls.control_description:
Provided that where an NBFC has been in existence for less
than three financial years, the above requirement shall be
since registration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be since registration

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the total dividend proposed for the financial year does not exceed the ceilings specified in this master direction
controls.control_description:
The Board shall ensure that the total dividend proposed for the financial year
does not exceed the ceilings specified in this Master Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the total dividend proposed for the financial year does not exceed the ceilings specified in this master direction

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following minimum prudential requirements to be eligible to declare dividend:
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall comply with the following minimum prudential requirements to
be eligible to declare dividend:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following minimum prudential requirements to be eligible to declare dividend:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have maintained a minimum crar of 20 per cent for the financial year (each of the four quarters) for which dividend is proposed
controls.control_description:
An SPD shall have maintained a minimum CRAR of 20
per cent for the financial year (each of the four quarters) for
which dividend is proposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have maintained a minimum crar of 20 per cent for the financial year (each of the four quarters) for which dividend is proposed

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable
controls.control_description:
Note:
NBFC-D, NBFC-ICC, NBFC-Factor, NBFC-IFC, IDF-NBFC,
NBFC-MFI shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, for minimum applicable
regulatory capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital requirements
controls.control_description:
Parameter Requirement
HFC shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Housing
Finance Companies) Directions, 2025, for minimum
applicable regulatory capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (mortgage guarantee companies) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital requirements
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Mortgage
Guarantee Companies) Directions, 2025, for minimum
applicable regulatory capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (mortgage guarantee companies) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (core investment companies) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital requirements
controls.control_description:
CIC shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Core
Investment Companies) Directions, 2025, for minimum
applicable regulatory capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (core investment companies) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - peer to peer lending platform) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulat
controls.control_description:
NBFC-P2P shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Peer to Peer Lending
Platform) Directions, 2025, for minimum applicable
regulatory capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - peer to peer lending platform) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulat

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - account aggregator) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital
controls.control_description:
NBFC-AA shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Account Aggregator)
Directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - account aggregator) directions, 2025, for minimum applicable regulatory capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than six per cent in each of the last three years, including as at the close of the financial year for which dividend is proposed to be declar
controls.control_description:
(2) Net NPA The NNPA ratio shall be less than six per cent in each of the
last three years, including as at the close of the financial
year for which dividend is proposed to be declared.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than six per cent in each of the last three years, including as at the close of the financial year for which dividend is proposed to be declar

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of section 45ic of the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(3) Other criteria (i) An NBFC shall comply with the provisions of Section
45IC of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of section 45ic of the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of section 29c of the national housing bank act, 1987
controls.control_description:
Note: In case of HFCs, it shall comply with the provisions of
Section 29C of the National Housing Bank Act, 1987.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of section 29c of the national housing bank act, 1987

controls.control_objective: To ensure no ceiling on dividend payout ratio for nbfc-base layer having customer interface but not accepting public funds
controls.control_description:
Type of NBFC Maximum dividend payout
ratio (percentage)
1[NBFC holding Certificate of Registration as 'Type I NBFC']
(a)
No ceiling specified
Note: There shall no ceiling on dividend payout ratio for NBFC-Base Layer
having customer interface but not accepting public funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to no ceiling on dividend payout ratio for nbfc-base layer having customer interface but not accepting public funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the total dividend proposed for the financial year does not exceed the ceilings specified in these guidelines
controls.control_description:
The Board shall ensure that the total dividend proposed for the financial year
does not exceed the ceilings specified in these guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that the total dividend proposed for the financial year does not exceed the ceilings specified in these guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directio
controls.control_description:
The prudential treatment of reversal of excess provision, dividend payment by
an NBFC on reversal of such provisions and unrealized profits arising on
account of transfer of loans and Security Receipts guaranteed by the
Government of India shall be guided by the instructions contained in Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of
Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to declare dividend
controls.control_description:
(1) and (2) of Table 1] for each
of the last three financial years, may be eligible to declare dividend, subject to a
cap of ten per cent on the dividend payout ratio, provided the NBFC complies
with the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to declare dividend

controls.control_objective: To ensure declare any dividend
controls.control_description:
In case of SPDs, which have CRAR below the regulatory minimum of 15 per
cent in any of the four quarters of the financial year for which dividend is
proposed, they shall not declare any dividend.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to declare any dividend

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 33
controls.control_description:
For SPDs having CRAR at or
above the regulatory minimum of 15 per cent during each of the four quarters of
the financial year for which dividend is being considered, but lower than 20 per
cent in any of those quarters, the dividend payout ratio shall not exceed 33.3
per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 33

controls.control_objective: To ensure report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in annex i, within a fortnight after declaration of dividen
controls.control_description:
An NBFC (other than SPD) declaring dividend shall report details of dividend
declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in Annex I,
within a fortnight after declaration of dividend to the Regional Office of the
Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank, under whose jurisdiction it is
registered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in annex i, within a fortnight after declaration of dividen

controls.control_objective: To ensure report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in annex i within a fortnight after declaration of dividend
controls.control_description:
An HFC shall report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per
the format prescribed in Annex I within a fortnight after declaration of dividend
to the NHB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in annex i within a fortnight after declaration of dividend

controls.control_objective: To ensure report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in annex ii along with a copy of the resolution of the boar
controls.control_description:
An SPD shall report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per
the format prescribed in Annex II along with a copy of the resolution of the
Board recommending the dividend, within a fortnight after declaration of
dividend to the Internal Debt Management Department of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report details of dividend declared during the financial year as per the format prescribed in annex ii along with a copy of the resolution of the boar

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of
these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these Directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank̥ may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included in the statement
controls.control_description: Note: While submitting the statement for the final dividend declared, details of the interim dividends declared, if any, shall also be included in the statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be included in the statement
